zh.Woolley, West Riding of Yorkshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭越可爾伍利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher Woodruffe於1382年出生在英國越可爾伍利時，他的父親Sir John Woodruffe26歲，母親Mary Langfield25歲。他於大約1404年與Woodruffe在英國越可爾伍利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1430年4月14日在英國肯特福德維其享年48歲，埋葬在英國越可爾伍利。

zh-hans.Woolley, West Riding of Yorkshire, Engla: 英国英格兰越可爾伍利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher Woodruffe于1382年出生在英国越可爾伍利时，他的父亲Sir John Woodruffe26岁，母亲Mary Langfield25岁。他于大约1404年与Woodruffe在英国越可爾伍利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1430年4月14日在英国肯特福德維其享年48岁，埋葬在英国越可爾伍利。

nameMeanings.name: Woodruffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Woodruff
meanings: English: from Middle English woderove ‘woodruff, sweet woodruff’ (Old English wudurofe), a sweet-scented plant. The leaves of the plant have a sweet smell and the surname may also have been a nickname for one who used it as a perfume, or perhaps an ironical nickname for a malodorous person. Alternatively, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived at or near a place where woodruff grew. There may have been some confusion with Woodrow .

History: Two English families brought the name Woodruff to the American colonies: those of Matthew Woodruff and of John and Ann Woodruffe. The latter migrated to Lynn, MA, from Kent, and moved to Southampton, Long Island, NY, before 1640. John and Ann's many descendants were established in NJ, NC, and SC by 1790. The city of Woodruff, SC, is named for this family. The name is variously spelled Woodrove, Woodroffe, Woodruffe, Woodrough, and Woodruff in colonial records.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher Woodruffe was born in 1382, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Woodruffe, was 26 and his mother, Mary Langfield, was 25. He married Woodruffe about 1404, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 14 April 1430, in Fordwich, Kent, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Woolley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher Woodruffe est né en 1382, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Woodruffe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Langfield, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Woodruffe environ 1404, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1430, à Fordwich, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher Woodruffe 1382 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Woodruffe 26 und seine Mutter Mary Langfield 25. Er hat um 1404 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England Woodruffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 14. April 1430 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Fordwich, Kent, England und wurde in Woolley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Woodruffe è nato il nel 1382 nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Woodruffe, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mary Langfield, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Woodruffe circa 1404, nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 14 aprile 1430, nel Fordwich, Kent, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Woolley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Woolley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウリー
ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Woodruffeが1382年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Woodruffeは26歳，母Mary Langfieldは25歳であった。約1404年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーでWoodruffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1430年4月14日にイギリスケントフォードウィチで48歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Woodruffe(이)가 1382년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Woodruffe(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Langfield(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1404년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 Woodruffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1430년 4월 14일 영국 켄트 포드위치에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 보리에 묻혔다.

mn.Woolley, West Riding of Yorkshire, Engla: Woolley, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Woodruffe nasceu em 1382, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Woodruffe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Langfield, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Woodruffe aproximadamente 1404, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1430, em Fordwich, Kent, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher Woodruffe родился в 1382 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Woodruffe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Langfield, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Woodruffe около 1404 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 14 апреля 1430 г. в местности фордвич, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christopher Woodruffe nació en 1382, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Woodruffe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary Langfield, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Woodruffe aproximadamente 1404, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 14 de abril de 1430, en Fordwich, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
